transforms: Filtered the official WPI CSV to Syria rows by country and Syria UN/LOCODE values.
Matched WPI rows to existing maritime records by UN/LOCODE and port name.
Normalized WPI numbers by removing CSV decimal formatting.
Updated coordinates for matched records to WPI port-specific coordinates.
Did not import WPI facility characteristics as live operational status.
reviewNotes: Imported WPI identifiers and port-specific coordinates for 3 existing maritime records: Tartus (45003), Baniyas (45005), and Al Ladhiqiyah/Latakia (45010). No new standalone records were added. The separate Tartus Oil Terminal record was not assigned WPI 45003 because WPI models Tartus as the main port with oil-terminal facilities rather than a separate terminal identity.
